metric_value: RDS eliminates much of the labor required to create a retail data mining system while providing analytical depth
notes: Aberdeen positions RDS as filling gap between comprehensive retail solutions and standalone data mining

metric_value: Comprehensive retail solutions have strong data analysis but lack drill-down detail capability; data mining has depth but requires substantial ongoing labor
notes: Aberdeen identifies two-sided market gap that KD1 claims to bridge

metric_value: Buyer-loyalty patterns and need to predict customer behavior are increasing competitive requirements for retailers
notes: Aberdeen frames retail data mining as competitively necessary

metric_value: RDS parallel processing allows system to scale-up and speed-up as retailer brings more data into system
notes: Parallel processing as key scalability differentiator for growing POS data volumes

metric_value: KD1 and RDS well-positioned to address retail data mining market with democratized access to results
notes: Aberdeen implies KD1 has viable market niche removing data mining specialist barrier

metric_value: KD1 did not survive as independent company; no record of activity post-late 1990s; retail analytics market won by larger vendors
notes: Small specialized vendors typically lost to Oracle SAS IBM and later open-source in retail analytics market

metric_value: Retail data mining market poised for growth as retailers seek to understand and predict customer behavior
notes: Aberdeen's framing implies growing market opportunity for retail analytics

metric_value: Data mining software market grew from ~$50M in 1996 to ~$800M by 2000; retail analytics became a major enterprise software segment
notes: Aberdeen directionally correct on market growth; KD1 did not capture it

metric_value: Data mining tools have not become proficient at delivering results to all retail professionals charged with daily decision making
notes: Identifies key barrier to retail data mining adoption: need to remove data mining specialists from the loop

metric_value: Retailers face continuously changing POS data requiring tools for value-added decisions on revenues, margins and cost reduction
notes: Aberdeen frames POS data volume and currency as core retail analytics challenge

metric_value: KD1 targets gap between comprehensive retail solutions and specialist data mining by eliminating specialist dependency
notes: Positioning strategy: easier-to-use data mining for retail professionals not just specialists

metric_value: RDS parallel processing enables both scale-up and speed-up capabilities for growing retail data
notes: Technical architecture characteristic cited as key RDS advantage
